definitions.researchQuestion: Recompute bounded action/no-action triage by window, horizon, evidence threshold, catalyst horizon, and risk posture inside Brief; no top-level Simple

parameterDefinitions.label: Brief window
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the scheduled evidence window used for triage.

parameterDefinitions.label: Decision horizon
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the number of sessions covered by the action assessment.

parameterDefinitions.label: Evidence threshold
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the minimum evidence score before an action can be considered.

parameterDefinitions.label: Catalyst horizon
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Bounds which forthcoming catalysts participate in triage.

parameterDefinitions.label: Risk posture
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the declared posture used to rank action and no-action outcomes.

limitations: Scope 01 validates declaration metadata only and makes no adapter-execution claim.

definitions.researchQuestion: Wrap owning breadth/treemap inputs to test broad versus narrow leadership under window, grouping, size, breadth threshold, and outlier sigma

parameterDefinitions.label: Return window
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the return window used to classify leadership.

parameterDefinitions.label: Grouping
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the grouping used for breadth aggregation.

parameterDefinitions.label: Size metric
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects how constituents contribute to breadth.

parameterDefinitions.label: Breadth threshold
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the participation threshold for broad leadership.

parameterDefinitions.label: Outlier sigma
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the within-group distance required to flag an outlier.

limitations: Scope 01 validates declaration metadata only and makes no adapter-execution claim.

definitions.researchQuestion: Recompute EOD unusualness under expiry, vol/OI, premium, IV, and call/put aggregation without trade-side inference

parameterDefinitions.label: Expiry window
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Bounds the expirations included in anomaly scoring.

parameterDefinitions.label: Volume to open interest threshold
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the minimum volume-to-open-interest ratio for unusualness.

parameterDefinitions.label: Premium threshold
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the minimum premium notional included in the ranking.

parameterDefinitions.label: Implied volatility threshold
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the implied-volatility level used in anomaly scoring.

parameterDefinitions.label: Call-put aggregation
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects whether call and put evidence remains separate or is netted.

limitations: Scope 01 validates declaration metadata only and makes no trade-side-inference claim.

definitions.researchQuestion: Recompute session type/support-resistance under opening range, VWAP band, profile, control, and gamma context

parameterDefinitions.label: Opening range
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the opening interval used to classify the session.

parameterDefinitions.label: VWAP band
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the VWAP dispersion band used for location evidence.

parameterDefinitions.label: Profile window
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the number of sessions used by the volume profile.

parameterDefinitions.label: Control threshold
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the evidence threshold for the control classification.

parameterDefinitions.label: Gamma context
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects whether current same-cutoff gamma evidence participates.

limitations: Scope 01 validates declaration metadata only and makes no live-session adapter claim.

definitions.researchQuestion: Simulate trend/reversal state under MA horizons, breakout tolerance, volume/OBV confirmation, pattern threshold, and regime window

parameterDefinitions.label: Fast moving average
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the fast trend horizon.

parameterDefinitions.label: Medium moving average
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the medium trend horizon.

parameterDefinitions.label: Slow moving average
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the slow regime horizon.

parameterDefinitions.label: Breakout tolerance
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the distance required to confirm a breakout.

parameterDefinitions.label: Volume confirmation
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the relative-volume threshold for confirmation.

parameterDefinitions.label: Require OBV confirmation
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Declares whether OBV direction must agree with the transition.

parameterDefinitions.label: Pattern threshold
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the minimum pattern evidence score.

parameterDefinitions.label: Regime window
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the trailing window for regime classification.

limitations: Scope 01 validates declaration metadata only and makes no owner-model execution claim.

definitions.researchQuestion: Recompute walls/flip/expected move/skew under expiry, spot shock, IV shock, sign convention, OI weighting, rate, and time

parameterDefinitions.label: Expiry horizon
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the expiry horizon used to build the surface.

parameterDefinitions.label: Spot shock
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Applies a bounded spot scenario to the surface.

parameterDefinitions.label: IV shock
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Applies a bounded implied-volatility shock.

parameterDefinitions.label: Dealer sign convention
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the declared dealer-position sign convention.

parameterDefinitions.label: Open-interest weighting
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects how open interest contributes to wall strength.

parameterDefinitions.label: Risk-free rate
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the explicit rate used by option calculations.

parameterDefinitions.label: Time decay
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Advances the scenario clock by a bounded number of days.

limitations: Scope 01 validates declaration metadata only and makes no live-chain execution claim.

definitions.researchQuestion: Recompute pin/trend/overextension playbooks under spot path, time, sign, OVI threshold, aggressiveness, and horizon

parameterDefinitions.label: Spot path
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the bounded spot-path scenario.

parameterDefinitions.label: Time to expiry
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the remaining time in the expiration cycle.

parameterDefinitions.label: Dealer sign
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the explicit dealer-position convention.

parameterDefinitions.label: OVI threshold
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the Option Volume Imbalance percentile required for emphasis.

parameterDefinitions.label: Aggressiveness
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the declared playbook posture.

parameterDefinitions.label: Horizon
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the playbook horizon.

limitations: Scope 01 validates declaration metadata only and makes no trading-execution claim.

definitions.researchQuestion: Recompute into/out candidates under lookbacks, acceleration, breadth, risk, benchmark, and ETF-fit weights

parameterDefinitions.label: Short lookback
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the short momentum horizon.

parameterDefinitions.label: Long lookback
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the long momentum horizon.

parameterDefinitions.label: Acceleration weight
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Weights momentum acceleration in transition scoring.

parameterDefinitions.label: Breadth weight
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Weights member breadth in transition scoring.

parameterDefinitions.label: Risk penalty weight
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Weights the declared risk penalty.

parameterDefinitions.label: Benchmark
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the public benchmark for relative momentum.

parameterDefinitions.label: ETF fit weight
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Weights vehicle fit in the selected-sector projection.

limitations: Scope 01 validates declaration metadata only and makes no allocation claim.

definitions.researchQuestion: Recompute country queue under horizon weights, FX, local-close freshness, volatility, and diversification

parameterDefinitions.label: Short horizon weight
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Weights short-horizon relative momentum.

parameterDefinitions.label: Medium horizon weight
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Weights medium-horizon relative momentum.

parameterDefinitions.label: Long horizon weight
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Weights long-horizon relative momentum.

parameterDefinitions.label: FX confirmation weight
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Weights FX confirmation in the country score.

parameterDefinitions.label: Local close maximum age
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the maximum accepted local-close age.

parameterDefinitions.label: Volatility penalty
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Penalizes higher realized volatility.

parameterDefinitions.label: Diversification weight
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Weights diversification contribution in the queue.

limitations: Scope 01 validates declaration metadata only and makes no allocation claim.

definitions.researchQuestion: Recompute the selected asset-specific driver model under USD, rates, risk, volatility, drawdown, and breadth

parameterDefinitions.label: US dollar shock
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Applies a bounded US-dollar scenario.

parameterDefinitions.label: Rate shock
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Applies a bounded rate scenario.

parameterDefinitions.label: Risk appetite
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the declared risk-appetite scenario.

parameterDefinitions.label: Volatility penalty
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the penalty for realized volatility.

parameterDefinitions.label: Drawdown limit
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the drawdown level used by the risk constraint.

parameterDefinitions.label: Breadth threshold
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the confirmation threshold for driver breadth.

limitations: Scope 01 validates declaration metadata only and makes no live-adapter execution claim.

definitions.researchQuestion: Recompute sleeve outcomes under horizon, rate/spread shock, carry, convexity, inflation/real-yield, and confirmation

parameterDefinitions.label: Horizon
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the fixed-income scenario horizon.

parameterDefinitions.label: Rate shock
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Applies a bounded government-rate scenario.

parameterDefinitions.label: Spread shock
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Applies a bounded credit-spread scenario.

parameterDefinitions.label: Carry
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the explicit annualized carry assumption.

parameterDefinitions.label: Convexity
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the declared convexity contribution.

parameterDefinitions.label: Inflation shock
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Applies a bounded inflation scenario.

parameterDefinitions.label: Real-yield shock
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Applies a bounded real-yield scenario.

parameterDefinitions.label: Confirmation threshold
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the minimum independent-confirmation score.

limitations: Scope 01 validates declaration metadata only and makes no sleeve-selection claim.

definitions.researchQuestion: Recompute beneficiary/portfolio distributions under horizon, theme weights, crowding, dampers, correlation, and objective

parameterDefinitions.label: Horizon
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the portfolio research horizon.

parameterDefinitions.label: Theme weight
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the selected theme contribution.

parameterDefinitions.label: Crowding penalty
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Penalizes crowded beneficiary exposures.

parameterDefinitions.label: Risk damper
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the declared portfolio risk damper.

parameterDefinitions.label: Correlation ceiling
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the maximum accepted pairwise correlation.

parameterDefinitions.label: Objective
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the portfolio objective.

parameterDefinitions.label: Simulation seed
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the reproducible distribution path.

limitations: Scope 01 validates declaration metadata only and makes no portfolio-execution claim.

definitions.researchQuestion: Recompute margin/EPS/valuation bridge under depreciation, mix, FX, memory, capex phase, anchor, and multiple

parameterDefinitions.label: Depreciation growth
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the depreciation growth assumption.

parameterDefinitions.label: Mix shift
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the price and product-mix contribution.

parameterDefinitions.label: FX impact
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the foreign-exchange contribution.

parameterDefinitions.label: Memory cost impact
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the memory-cost-cycle margin contribution.

parameterDefinitions.label: Capex phase
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the declared capex-cycle phase.

parameterDefinitions.label: Earnings anchor
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the explicit Q4 earnings anchor.

parameterDefinitions.label: Valuation multiple
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the forward earnings multiple used by the valuation bridge.

limitations: Scope 01 validates declaration metadata only and makes no earnings-forecast claim.

definitions.researchQuestion: Recompute a bounded source-qualified company scenario while preserving evidence gaps and accepted-state lineage

parameterDefinitions.label: Accepted state
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the source-qualified accepted state.

parameterDefinitions.label: Growth assumption
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the explicit revenue-growth assumption.

parameterDefinitions.label: Margin change
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the explicit margin-change assumption.

parameterDefinitions.label: Evidence gap policy
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects how unresolved source gaps affect the scenario.

parameterDefinitions.label: Lineage cutoff
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the maximum accepted lineage age.

limitations: Scope 01 validates declaration metadata only and preserves unavailable evidence as unavailable.

definitions.researchQuestion: Recompute ranking/basket under horizon, momentum blend, risk penalty, benchmark, weighting, and constraints

parameterDefinitions.label: Horizon
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the momentum horizon.

parameterDefinitions.label: Momentum weight
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Weights momentum in the ranking score.

parameterDefinitions.label: Risk penalty
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Penalizes volatility and drawdown in the ranking.

parameterDefinitions.label: Benchmark
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the public relative-performance benchmark.

parameterDefinitions.label: Basket weighting
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects how ranked ETFs contribute to the basket.

parameterDefinitions.label: Maximum constituent weight
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Caps the declared basket weight for one ETF.

limitations: Scope 01 validates declaration metadata only and makes no allocation claim.

definitions.researchQuestion: Reuse seeded path/walk-forward logic with explicit goal, one-variable search, budget, overfit penalty, seed, and acceptance

parameterDefinitions.label: Research goal
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the one declared optimization goal.

parameterDefinitions.label: Variable to test
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the only variable permitted to change in the search.

parameterDefinitions.label: Search budget
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Caps the number of candidate trials.

parameterDefinitions.label: Overfit penalty
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the explicit multiple-testing penalty.

parameterDefinitions.label: Path seed
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the reproducible synthetic path.

parameterDefinitions.label: Acceptance threshold
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the out-of-sample improvement required for acceptance.

parameterDefinitions.label: Walk-forward folds
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the number of walk-forward folds.

limitations: Scope 01 validates declaration metadata only and makes no strategy-acceptance claim.

definitions.researchQuestion: Recompute OOS/deflated evidence under rule, universe, folds, embargo, costs, trials, and robustness

parameterDefinitions.label: Strategy rule
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the mechanical strategy rule under test.

parameterDefinitions.label: Universe
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the source-qualified test universe.

parameterDefinitions.label: Walk-forward folds
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the number of out-of-sample folds.

parameterDefinitions.label: Embargo
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the data-leakage embargo between folds.

parameterDefinitions.label: Trading cost
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the explicit round-trip cost assumption.

parameterDefinitions.label: Trial count
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the number of variants used by the deflation penalty.

parameterDefinitions.label: Robustness threshold
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the required held-instrument fraction.

limitations: Scope 01 validates declaration metadata only and makes no edge-survival claim.

definitions.researchQuestion: Recompute surviving conviction under source mix, lag half-life, cluster, consensus, and decay

parameterDefinitions.label: Source mix
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the disclosed-source mix.

parameterDefinitions.label: Lag half-life
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the disclosure-lag decay half-life.

parameterDefinitions.label: Cluster minimum
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the minimum disclosures required for a cluster.

parameterDefinitions.label: Consensus threshold
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the required directional consensus.

parameterDefinitions.label: Decay floor
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the minimum surviving conviction after lag decay.

limitations: Scope 01 validates declaration metadata only and makes no copy-trade claim.

definitions.researchQuestion: Recompute market suitability under budget, property, water, travel, insurance/flood, and club verification

parameterDefinitions.label: Maximum budget
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the maximum purchase budget.

parameterDefinitions.label: Minimum property size
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the minimum interior size.

parameterDefinitions.label: Water type
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the required waterfront class.

parameterDefinitions.label: Travel limit
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the approximate maximum travel time to a club.

parameterDefinitions.label: Insurance risk ceiling
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the maximum accepted insurance-risk class.

parameterDefinitions.label: Require flood verification
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Declares whether flood evidence is required for a finalist.

parameterDefinitions.label: Require club verification
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Declares whether current Masters-club evidence is required.

limitations: Scope 01 validates declaration metadata only; travel time remains an approximate research screen.

definitions.researchQuestion: Wrap RLVOL to recompute forecast/regime/throttle under estimator, window, target, cap/floor, notional, and horizon

parameterDefinitions.label: Estimator
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the declared conditional-volatility estimator.

parameterDefinitions.label: Regime window
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the trailing window for regime percentiles.

parameterDefinitions.label: Target volatility
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the annualized target volatility.

parameterDefinitions.label: Multiplier cap
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Caps the magnitude-only sizing multiplier.

parameterDefinitions.label: Volatility floor
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the denominator floor used by the throttle.

parameterDefinitions.label: Reference notional
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the worked-example notional without creating an order.

parameterDefinitions.label: Forecast horizon
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the forecast horizon.

limitations: The declaration is magnitude-only and cannot infer direction or execute a position.

definitions.researchQuestion: Reuse the owning rental engine for cash-flow sensitivity under segment, ADR, occupancy, financing, costs, insurance/regulation, and horizon

parameterDefinitions.label: Market segment
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the source-qualified market segment.

parameterDefinitions.label: Average daily rate
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the explicit average-daily-rate assumption.

parameterDefinitions.label: Occupancy
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the explicit occupancy assumption.

parameterDefinitions.label: Financing rate
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the explicit financing-rate assumption.

parameterDefinitions.label: Operating cost
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the operating-cost share of revenue.

parameterDefinitions.label: Annual insurance
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the explicit annual insurance assumption.

parameterDefinitions.label: Regulation stress
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the bounded regulatory-revenue stress.

parameterDefinitions.label: Horizon
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the acquisition scenario horizon.

limitations: Scope 01 validates declaration metadata only; missing property economics remain unavailable.

definitions.researchQuestion: Reuse the owning rental engine for seasonal cash-flow sensitivity under segment, ADR, occupancy, financing, costs, storm/insurance, regulation, and horizon

parameterDefinitions.label: Market segment
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the source-qualified market segment.

parameterDefinitions.label: Average daily rate
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the explicit average-daily-rate assumption.

parameterDefinitions.label: Occupancy
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the explicit seasonal occupancy assumption.

parameterDefinitions.label: Financing rate
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the explicit financing-rate assumption.

parameterDefinitions.label: Operating cost
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the operating-cost share of revenue.

parameterDefinitions.label: Storm and insurance stress
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the bounded storm and insurance cost stress.

parameterDefinitions.label: Regulation stress
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the bounded regulatory-revenue stress.

parameterDefinitions.label: Horizon
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the acquisition scenario horizon.

limitations: Scope 01 validates declaration metadata only; missing property economics remain unavailable.

definitions.researchQuestion: Recompute setup state/expectancy under timeframe, data tier, five gate thresholds, entry/stop/cost, and family requirements; until the owner model exists, return explicit unavailable rather than use the current foundation receipt as a signal

parameterDefinitions.label: Timeframe
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the decision timeframe.

parameterDefinitions.label: Data tier
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Selects the source-qualified data tier.

parameterDefinitions.label: Context threshold
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the minimum context-gate score.

parameterDefinitions.label: Location threshold
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the minimum location-gate score.

parameterDefinitions.label: Confirmation threshold
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the minimum confirmation-gate score.

parameterDefinitions.label: Validation threshold
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the minimum validation-gate score.

parameterDefinitions.label: Entry price
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Uses the source-qualified entry value when it exists; no value is substituted.

parameterDefinitions.label: Stop distance
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the explicit invalidation distance.

parameterDefinitions.label: Round-trip cost
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the explicit round-trip cost assumption.

parameterDefinitions.label: Model-family requirement
parameterDefinitions.interpretation: Sets the number of independent model families required for qualification.

limitations: Until owner evidence exists, the adapter must return unavailable rather than reinterpret the foundation receipt as a signal.
